title: Better Vanilla +
description: The Ultimate Way to Enhance your Minecraft Experience
body:
Ultimately enhance your Minecraft experience trough BetterVanilla+
This lightweight client-side modpack takes the next step and takes to the next level every aspect of your game.
# OPTIMIZATION
Some mods such as sodium, entityculling, ferritecore and many more optimize your game making it much smoother and cleaner, easily doubling your FPS
# SOCIALIZE
The Essentials mod makes you able to send friend request to player, have cosmetics, invite friends to your singleplayer world and even emoting
# UTILITY
Some mods like Xaero's Minimap, Chest Finder, Mousetweaks and many more add a bunch of features to truly enchance your game
# BETTER THAN OPTIFINE
On this modpack there is a list of mods to fully replace any optifine feature like capes, custom item and entity models, connected textures
# ENHANCE YOUR LOOKS
The BetterVanilla+ modpack includes the BetterVanilla resourcepack to have a the game look better
